nodes.name: 👤 User Layer
nodes.notes: Entry point for all user interactions. Handles user authentication, session management, and initial request processing.

nodes.name: 💻 Frontend App
nodes.notes: React Progressive Web Application handling user interface, offline functionality, and client-side operations.

nodes.name: 🛍️ Commerce Layer
nodes.notes: Product marketplace with Stripe payment integration, shopping cart, and order management.

nodes.name: 🗄️ Data Layer
nodes.notes: Carbon footprint calculation engine with ESG database and comprehensive analytics.

nodes.name: 🤖 AI Layer
nodes.notes: Machine Learning models for Monitoring, Reporting, and Verification (MRV) with predictive analytics.

nodes.name: 🌱 Carbon Layer
nodes.notes: Project registry with credit creation, database storage, and retirement system.

nodes.name: ✅ Verification Layer
nodes.notes: Oracle network with satellite/IoT integration for comprehensive project verification.

nodes.name: 💹 Marketplace Layer
nodes.notes: Credit trading engine with auction system and liquidity pools.

nodes.name: 💰 Finance Layer
nodes.notes: Escrow services with Stripe payment processing and regulatory compliance.

nodes.name: 📊 Analytics Layer
nodes.notes: Impact dashboard with KPI tracking, custom reports, and predictive analytics.

nodes.name: 🔄 User Feedback Loop
nodes.notes: Continuous feedback collection and analysis system for user experience improvement.
